evals.prompt: A collaborator uses either Claude Code or Codex in this repository. I want the latest remote changes before work. Can we just tell the agent once instead of making a launcher or a large synchronization service?
evals.expected_output: Prefer a natural-language or project-instruction workflow. Use git pull --ff-only only on a clean worktree; do not auto-stash, merge, rebase, or overwrite. Do not propose a hook unless pre-prompt timing is explicitly required.
assertions: Does not propose a launcher, shortcut, or custom synchronization daemon
Uses project instructions or a normal Agent request as the default
Preserves dirty/diverged work rather than auto-stashing

evals.prompt: I see the same SessionStart message three times. Find out why and tell me what to change. Do not assume there are three registrations.
evals.expected_output: Audit all hook scopes and correlate firings with root/resume/compact/subagent sessions before editing. Distinguish duplicate configuration from one hook firing in several agents.
assertions: Correlates each output with lifecycle source or agent session
States a verified root cause before proposing a fix

evals.prompt: This TypeScript repository has package.json and package-lock.json, no Python files, and no ONBOARDING.md. Help me get it running.
evals.expected_output: Read AGENTS/CLAUDE/README and Node manifests, use npm because the lockfile declares it, and verify the project-defined start/test path. Do not require ffmpeg, uv, Python, .env, or a new onboarding file without evidence.
assertions: Does not require Python, uv, ffmpeg, or .env
Does not stop to ask whether to create ONBOARDING.md

evals.prompt: I explicitly need a dynamic setup reminder injected before the first Claude Code prompt. Install it without touching my existing PreToolUse hooks, and make sure resume and compact do not fire it.
evals.expected_output: Pass the hook gate, preview the managed change, preserve unrelated settings, install one SessionStart group with matcher startup, verify with claude --init-only and normal sessions, and provide managed removal.
assertions: Preserves unrelated settings and avoids duplicate managed entries
